ddls:
CREATE TABLE "household_expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household expense entry */,
  "family_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the family size category */,
  "northeast" TEXT /* Monthly household expenses in the Northeast region */,
  "south" TEXT /* Monthly household expenses in the South region */,
  "west" TEXT /* Monthly household expenses in the West region */,
  "midwest" TEXT /* Monthly household expenses in the Midwest region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expense entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expense entry was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who created the expense entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who last updated the expense entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_expenses_family_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_size_id") REFERENCES family_sizes ("family_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_sizes" (
  "family_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family size category */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Number of people in the family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the family size category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Northeast, South, West, Midwest) */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the region (e.g., NE, S, W, MW) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial planner, researcher, policymaker) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense trend entry */,
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household expense entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the expense */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the expense */,
  "expense" TEXT /* Monthly household expenses */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expense trend entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expense trend entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_trends_expense_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_id") REFERENCES household_expenses ("expense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget recommendation entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "family_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the family size category */,
  "northeast" TEXT /* Recommended monthly household expenses in the Northeast region */,
  "south" TEXT /* Recommended monthly household expenses in the South region */,
  "west" TEXT /* Recommended monthly household expenses in the West region */,
  "midwest" TEXT /* Recommended monthly household expenses in the Midwest region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget recommendation entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget recommendation entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_recommendations_family_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_size_id") REFERENCES family_sizes ("family_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the platform */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., household expenses, budget recommendations) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household expense entry */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was updated */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_expense_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_id") REFERENCES household_expenses ("expense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being commented on */,
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense entry being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_expense_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_id") REFERENCES household_expenses ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sharing record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the data */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being shared */,
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense entry being shared */,
  "sharing_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was shared */,
  "sharing_type" TEXT /* Type of sharing (e.g., public, private, collaborator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_expense_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_id") REFERENCES household_expenses ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
